chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/15)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/15)

parts.text: الْحَسَنِ ابْنَيْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ أَنَّهُمَا حَدَّثَاهُ

text: سَنَةِ تِسْعٍ وَ سَبْعِينَ وَ مِائَتَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْعَبْدِيِّ عَنْ ضَوْءِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ فَارِسَ سَمَّاهُ أَنَّ أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ أَرَاهُ إِيَّاهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad and Al Hassan the two sons of Ali Bin Ibrahim, that they had both been narrated to in the year two hundred and ninety three, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Rahman Al Abady, from Zou Bin Ali Al Ijaly,
(It has been narrated) from a man from the people of Persia whom he named that Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> had shown him<sup>asws</sup> to him’.
en.sarwar: 14. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad and al-Hassan, two sons of Ali ibn Ibrahim narrated to him in the year two hundred seventy nine from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Rahman al-‘Abdi from Daw’ ibn Ali al-‘Ijli from a man from the people of Fars whose name he mentioned has that abu Muhammad (a.s.) him (the twelfth Imam (a.s.) ) to him.
